title: 葵ステークスの後に・バクシン、極

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh... HA, HA, HAH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was fast, I knew I'd be! Nothing new for the class
representative blessed with speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I went beyond lightning and crossed
over into the speed of sound.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This shows I've grown quite a bit! So naturally, the
next step for me is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To challenge the last race of the Triple Crown
tour, the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe I should go for the autumn Tenno Sho.
It's the king of medium-distance races, where all
the top seniors go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both the Kikuka Sho and the autumn Tenno Sho
are 2,000 meters. That's too far a distance for
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, they both take place around the same
time... well, that settles it—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Why are you mad at me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And what do you mean by "don't get a head"? I
already have one. And two of them won't make
me any more popular!
choice_data_list: It's too early to be getting full of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Eh?! What's that supposed to mean!
choice_data_list: Have you really mastered your speed?
Have you really mastered your speed?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand what you're getting at! I just
won the race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I think that's enough proof of my speed!
choice_data_list: You can say that once you win a G1.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A G1?! But that means...
choice_data_list: The ultimate test of speed, the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a race that gets plenty of recognition even outside of Japan. You could even say it is the race for sprinters. It's basically made for her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...You're right! Until I win that race, I can't call
myself the fastest.
choice_data_list:
I want you to be the world's fastest class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The fastest class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Understood! I will go for it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the Sprinters Stakes and become the
fastest class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's get that title and give the Bakushin Road a
good sprucing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has come... Sakura Bakushin O will
finally challenge the Sprinters Stakes!
